name: seleniumplusplus

metadata.name: seleniumplusplus
metadata.summary: Speeds up automation when using selenium

documentation: This library provides a set of utility functions and classes to facilitate automated web interactions using Selenium WebDriver. It includes functionalities for waiting for elements, interacting with elements, and performing various actions on web elements. The library is designed to be easy to use and flexible, allowing users to quickly create automated web interactions without having to write complex code.

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.test.main
documentation: Main function

modules.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer
documentation: driver_initializer.py

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer.init_driver
documentation:
Enhanced driver initialization with more options

```
param url

The URL to navigate to

param headless

Whether to run in headless mode

param custom_options

Dictionary of additional Chrome options

return

Initialized WebDriver
```

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer.read_login_env
documentation:
Reads environment variables for username and password IDs.

Args:
    username_id (str): The environment variable for the username for example: "LOGIN_NAME".
    password_id (str): The environment variable for the password for example: "PASSWORD".

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer.read_csv
documentation:
Reads a CSV file and returns its content as a list of dictionaries.

Args:
- path (str): The path to the CSV file.
- delimiter (str): The delimiter used in the CSV file (default is ";").
- encoding (str): The encoding of the CSV file (default is "utf-8-sig").

Returns:
- list: A list of dictionaries where each dictionary represents a row in the CSV file.

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer.safe_file_operation
documentation: Decorator for safe file operations with proper error handling

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer.save_csv
documentation: Enhanced CSV saving with better path handling and validation

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer.read_json
documentation:
Reads a JSON file and returns the data as a list of dictionaries.

Args:
    path (str): The path to the JSON file.
    data (list): The list to append the data to. Defaults to an empty list.

Returns:
    list: The data from the JSON file as a list of dictionaries.

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_initializer.save_json
documentation:
Saves the data to a JSON file at the specified path.

Args:
    path (str): The path to the JSON file.
    data (list): The data to be saved as a list of dictionaries.

Returns:
    bool: True if the data was saved successfully, False otherwise.

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.logger.setup_logger
documentation:
Configure and return a logger with both console and rotating file handlers.

```
param log_file

Name of the log file

param level

Logging level (default: INFO)

param max_bytes

Max size of each log file before rotation

param backup_count

Number of backup files to keep

param log_format

Custom log format string

param log_dir

Directory for log files (default: current directory)

return

Configured logger instance
```

functions.name: seleniumplusplus.logger.set_log_level
documentation:
Set the logging level for all handlers.

```
param level

Logging level (can be string name or integer level)
```

classes.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.WaitUtils

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.WaitUtils.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the WaitUtils with the WebDriver instance and a default timeout.

```
param driver

The WebDriver instance to use.

param timeout

The maximum time to wait for elements (in seconds).
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.WaitUtils.wait_for_element
documentation: Enhanced wait_for_element with better error handling and timeout override

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.WaitUtils.wait_for_clickable
documentation:
Waits for an element to be clickable, located by a specific selector.

```
param by

The method to locate the element (e.g., 'id', 'xpath').

param value

The value of the locator (e.g., 'button-id').

return

The WebElement if found and clickable, otherwise raises TimeoutException.
```
Utility class to handle waiting for elements using Selenium WebDriver.

classes.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.__init__
documentation:
Initializes SeleniumUtils with WebDriver, timeout, and related utilities.

```
param driver

The WebDriver instance to use.

param timeout

The maximum time to wait for elements (in seconds).
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.move_to_element
documentation:
Moves the mouse pointer to the specified WebElement.

```
param element

The WebElement to move to.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.find_element
documentation:
Finds an element based on the provided locator and optionally moves to it.

```
param by

The method to locate the element (e.g., 'id', 'xpath').

param value

The value of the locator (e.g., 'button-id').

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.

return

The located WebElement.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.fill_input
documentation:
Fills an input field with the specified text.

```
param by

The method to locate the input field (e.g., 'id', 'xpath').

param value

The value of the locator (e.g., 'input-id').

param input_text

The text to input.

param exact_match

Whether to match the locator exactly.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.select_option_by_text
documentation:
Selects an option in a dropdown by visible text.

```
param by

The method to locate the dropdown (e.g., 'id', 'xpath').

param value

The value of the locator (e.g., 'select-id').

param option_text

The visible text of the option to select.

param exact_match

Whether to match the locator exactly.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.select_option_by_value
documentation:
Selects an option in a dropdown by value.

```
param by

The method to locate the dropdown (e.g., 'id', 'xpath').

param value

The value of the locator (e.g., 'select-id').

param option_value

The value attribute of the option to select.

param exact_match

Whether to match the locator exactly.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.construct_xpath
documentation:
Constructs an XPath expression based on the provided tag, attribute, value, and match type.

```
param tag

The HTML tag to search for (e.g., 'input', 'select').

param attribute

The attribute to match on (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param value

The value of the attribute to match.

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

return

The constructed XPath string.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.find_element_by_text_or_attribute
documentation:
Finds an element by its text or various attributes (e.g., class, aria-label, placeholder).

```
param text

The text or attribute value to search for.

param tag

The HTML tag to search within (default is any tag).

param exact_match

If True, matches the text exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.

return

The found WebElement.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.fill_input_by_attribute
documentation:
Fills an input field located by a specific attribute and value.

```
param attribute

The HTML attribute to search for (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param attribute_name

The value of the attribute.

param input_text

The text to input into the field.

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.fill_select_by_text
documentation:
Selects an option in a dropdown by visible text, located by a specific attribute and value.

```
param attribute

The HTML attribute to search for (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param attribute_name

The value of the attribute.

param option_text

The visible text of the option to select.

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.fill_select_by_value
documentation:
Selects an option in a dropdown by value, located by a specific attribute and value.

```
param attribute

The HTML attribute to search for (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param attribute_name

The value of the attribute.

param option_value

The value of the option to select.

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.fill_boolean_select
documentation:
Selects an option in a dropdown based on a boolean value (Yes/No).

```
param attribute

The HTML attribute to search for (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param attribute_name

The value of the attribute.

param value

The boolean value (True for 'Yes', False for 'No').

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.fill_date_input
documentation:
Fills a date input field located by a specific attribute and value.

```
param attribute

The HTML attribute to search for (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param attribute_name

The value of the attribute.

param date

The date to input (e.g., '2024-10-14').

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.fill_datetime_input
documentation:
Fills a datetime input field located by a specific attribute and value.

```
param attribute

The HTML attribute to search for (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param attribute_name

The value of the attribute.

param datetime_str

The datetime to input (e.g., '2024-10-14T12:00').

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly; otherwise, uses 'contains'.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.find_element_by_id
documentation:
Finds an element by its ID.

```
param element_id

The ID of the element to search for.

param exact_match

If True, matches the ID exactly.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.

return

The found WebElement.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.get_element_by_attribute
documentation:
Waits for an element to be located by a specific attribute and value.

```
param attribute

The HTML attribute to search for (e.g., 'id', 'name').

param attribute_value

The value of the attribute.

param wait_condition

The condition to wait for (e.g., presence, visibility).

param tag

The HTML tag to search within (default is any tag).

param exact_match

If True, matches the attribute exactly.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.

return

The located WebElement.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.get_clickable_element_by_text
documentation:
Fixed version that properly finds clickable elements with text.
Added include_descendants parameter to control text search scope.

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.get_clickable_elements_by_text
documentation:
Finds all clickable elements matching the specified text.

```
param text

The text to search for.

param exact_match

If True, matches the text exactly.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the element after finding it.

return

A list of matching clickable WebElements.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.get_button_by_label
documentation:
Enhanced button finder that handles various button implementations.

```
param label

The label/text of the button to search for

param exact_match

If True, matches the label exactly

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the button after finding it

param include_spans

Include span elements that act as buttons

param include_inputs

Include input elements of type button/submit

param case_sensitive

Whether to match text case sensitively

return

The found button WebElement
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.get_buttons_by_label
documentation:
Finds all button elements matching the specified label.

```
param label

The label of the buttons to search for.

param exact_match

If True, matches the label exactly.

param move_to_element

Whether to move to the buttons after finding them.

return

A list of matching button WebElements.
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.safe_click
documentation:
New convenience method for safely clicking elements with retries

```
param element

The element to click

param retry_count

Number of retry attempts

return

True if click successful, False otherwise
```

methods.name: seleniumplusplus.selenium_utils.SeleniumUtils.wait_for_text
documentation:
New convenience method to wait for text to appear anywhere on the page

```
param text

Text to wait for

param timeout

Optional custom timeout

return

True if text found, False if timeout
```
Utility class to perform common actions using Selenium WebDriver.
